prediction.reasoning: Based on MCD's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually (1.2-1.5% daily), the stock exhibits relatively stable movement as a defensive consumer staple. The 20-day forecast assumes normal market conditions with slight upward bias due to MCD's consistent dividend growth and stable business model. Daily volatility of ~1.3% translates to ~5.8% volatility over 20 days (√20 scaling). Confidence intervals constructed using normal distribution assumptions around modest 0.7% growth over the period.
